lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Eyup. Not too often we get visitors down here.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Beats me. All I know is, there's dust devils in here, and I'm here to make sure only people with permission can kill 'em.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: You got a Slayer task for it, so sure, be my guest.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Not without a Slayer task. Go talk to a Slayer Master about it.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: The name's Dusty Aliv. I guard this place for the Slayer Masters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound like a great job.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Eh, it has its perks. Plus it beats flying around Gielinor after numbskulls like you trying to deliver mail like some people I know.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Thanks. Probably shouldn't tell you about the previous owner though.

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Let's just say the heat got to them.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Dusty Aliv
lines.text: Oi! Only people with a Slayer task can slay in here!
